summary: Persist normalized curator queue statuses from live outreach logs, infer email sends from recipient-only payloads, refresh dependent handoff/board artifacts, and verify with targeted tests.
expected_outcome: Future marketing runs stop re-treating already-contacted curator/publisher targets as fresh prepared work, reducing fake progress and improving lane selection.

verification.details: 12 tests passed after adding persistence + recipient-only email inference coverage.

replacement_condition: If future live outreach logs still leave stale prepared/waiting states in shared queue artifacts, extend normalization to the remaining queue families and add the corresponding regression tests.
